data.title: Huobi HTX celebrates Bitcoin Pizza Day and opens a new chapter in Web3 global consensus
data.description:
On May 22, 2025, the crypto industry ushered in an epoch-making moment.

The 15th Bitcoin Pizza Festival arrived as scheduled, and the price of BTC broke through the $110,000 mark, setting a record high; on the same day, the highly anticipated TRUMP dinner was held, and Sun Yuchen, the global consultant of Huobi HTX and the largest holder of $TRUMP, officially attended, once again pushing crypto assets into the mainstream focus of global attention. To commemorate Bitcoin’s extraordinary journey of leading global financial innovation over the past 15 years and to further strengthen its deep connection with community users, HTX DAO and Huobi HTX, with an offline celebration in both cities and a million-dollar online incentive, jointly presented a crypto feast that moves from community consensus to mainstream recognition.

Two cities linked to pay tribute to the 15th anniversary of Bitcoin Pizza Festival

On the day of Pizza Festival, HTX DAO, together with community members and ecological partners, held exclusive offline activities for Pizza Festival in Shenzhen and Beijing to pay tribute to the 15th Bitcoin Pizza Festival.

The "Interstellar Pizza Delivery Train" at Shenzhen Station took the lead, and HTX DAO customized luxury cars to shuttle through the city to deliver pizza to users, recreating the classic moment of "10,000 Bitcoins for Pizza" in 2010.

The Beijing station has created a dreamy "BTC Town" interactive game, where users can immersively experience Bitcoin "mining, poker, and consumption". At the same time, through tasks such as checking in and taking photos, they can win exquisite prizes such as HTX DAO limited peripherals and Dragon Boat Festival special gift boxes.

Not only that, Huobi HTX has also launched the "Global 12 Cities" Pizza Festival in Chengdu, Hubei, Wenzhou, Taiwan, Vietnam, Bangkok, Bangladesh, Indonesia, India, Sri Lanka[1] and other countries and regions, inviting users to enjoy free pizza.

This series of pizza festivals across the globe echoed Sun Yuchen's attendance at the Trump dinner, linking the historical intersection of Eastern community consensus and Western mainstream politics. It is a tribute to Bitcoin's fifteen-year journey of leading financial innovation, a collective declaration of crypto civilization moving towards the mainstream, and a manifestation of HTX DAO and Huobi HTX's firm practice in promoting the global consensus of Web3.

Online carnival, millions of USDT benefits ignite community enthusiasm

In terms of online activities, Huobi HTX, together with diamond sponsors JUST Protocol, SunPump, APENFT, BitTorrent, WINkLink, Steem and platinum sponsors Levva and ChainGPT, launched an online "Crypto Pizza Festival, Just in Huobi" themed aggregation welfare event, covering spot, contract, C2C, earning coins, community interaction and other scenarios, with a cumulative reward of nearly one million USDT, fully releasing the platform's ecological advantages and community feedback sincerity.

This online carnival attracted nearly 2 million participants, with more than 1 million participants in the pizza carnival user red envelope event alone, and nearly 200,000 USDT was awarded. It not only led to a significant increase in user activity, but also further deepened the ecological synergy and resource linkage between the platform and Web3 projects.

Inheriting the spirit of encryption: building a global Web3 future

Fifteen years ago, "10,000 Bitcoins for pizza" opened the legend of cryptocurrency; today, the aroma of pizza is still there, but it carries the taste of the entire Web3 era.

In the future, HTX DAO and Huobi HTX will continue to focus on users and deepen the Web3 ecosystem with a global perspective, and continuously inject new momentum into promoting the compliance and mainstreaming of the encryption industry.

data.title: Singularity 3.0 Conference: Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud Ecosystem Expansion New Milestone
data.description:
Guildford, UK – 21 May 2025 – The international forum “Singularity 3.0: Where AI Meets Web3 and Games”, co-hosted by Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud (Endless) and the University of Surrey Blockchain and Metaverse Applications Academy (SABMA), has come to a successful conclusion.

The event, held at Wates House at the University of Surrey, brought together global thought leaders, industry pioneers, academics and innovators to discuss the convergence of artificial intelligence, Web3 technology and immersive games. Singularity 3.0 not only amplifies the Endless Protocol’s vision to empower creators, developers and communities, but also consolidates its position as the cornerstone of the next generation digital economy.

Since the launch of the mainnet in March 2025, Endless has continued to promote rapid product iteration and ecosystem expansion, and has reached strategic cooperation with well-known industry-university-research institutions such as Alibaba Cloud and the University of Surrey to promote the rapid implementation of cutting-edge technologies; then launched a $1 million developer incentive plan in April this year to promote AI innovation and the transformation from Web2 to Web3. Now, many projects have participated in the application of this developer incentive plan.

In addition, at the Dubai Token 2049 series of events, Endless officially released its AI white paper "Endless AI: A Decentralized Intelligent Creator Ecosystem", which elaborated on its vision and strategy of integrating AI and Web3 technologies to promote decentralized innovation.

As a leading decentralized infrastructure platform for applications such as AI, Web3, games and content, Endless will redefine the digital ecosystem. This event is a critical moment in the construction of the Endless ecosystem and a catalyst for ecological cooperation among all parties. The event promotes diversified exchanges and groundbreaking cooperation among Web3, AI and multiple industries, and demonstrates its role as the best infrastructure for AI-driven, decentralized and gamified innovation. Professor Xiong Yu, Co-Chair of Endless and Associate Vice-President of the University of Surrey Star-studded guest lineup: the transformative potential of AI, Web3 and games

The forum invited guests from many well-known institutions such as Stability AI, Google, and Microsoft, whose insights illuminated the transformative potential of AI, Web3 and games. From the opening speech by Professor Yu Xiong of the University of Surrey to the closing coffee and networking session, Singularity 3.0 demonstrated the power of academic and industry collaboration in shaping the digital future. The guests also looked forward to the arrival of cross-field cooperation.

Professor Yu Xiong, Co-Chair of Endless and Associate Vice-President of the University of Surrey, said that the development and commercialization of AI and web3 are inseparable from excellent products and high-quality platforms, and the cooperation between Endless and the University of Surrey is the embodiment of a strong alliance.

Senior Advisor of the Endless Foundation Neeraj Sharma expressed his expectation for Endless as a decentralized infrastructure for AI and game content in the future, and believed that the cooperation between multiple parties would bring about a promising technological change. Rohitha Bogollagama, former Foreign Minister of Sri Lanka, also delivered a keynote speech at the conference, sharing his vision and profound thoughts on the future and development of AI.

Neeraj Sharma, Advisor, Endless Foundation

Luffa, a decentralized social application based on the Endless protocol, also attended the event. Oliver Venables, product director of Luffa, said that social networking is a scenario with high user frequency and full of interpersonal interaction networks, and is very suitable as a convergence platform for applications such as games and content. Luffa's mini-programs and super groups are good interactive entrances for games and content applications.

Oliver Venables, Luffa Product Director

These keynote speeches and panel discussions sparked heated discussions on decentralized identity, asset ownership, generative AI ethical frameworks, and new models of virtual economy. The event's carefully planned startup showcase highlighted applications at the intersection of AI, Web3 and the metaverse. Attendees, including students, researchers, and early-stage entrepreneurs, had the opportunity to interact directly with industry leaders, fostering connections that will drive future collaborations in the Endless ecosystem.

Endless: The Best Infrastructure for AI, Web3, and Gaming

Singularity 3.0 was more than just a forum, it was a catalyst for the expansion of the Endless ecosystem. By bringing together notable organizations such as Google, Microsoft, Animoca Brands, Stability AI, and the Blockchain Game Alliance, the event provided a vibrant platform for building strategic partnerships, showcasing cutting-edge applications, and driving conversations about the future of intelligent decentralized systems. This collaboration highlights Endless Protocol’s commitment to building a robust user-centric infrastructure that combines AI-native tools with blockchain technology for privacy, security, co-creation, and digital ownership.

“Singularity 3.0 is a transformative moment for Endless,” said Neeraj Sharma, Advisor to the Endless Foundation, the event’s organizer. "By bringing together the best minds in AI, Web3, and gaming, we are laying the foundation for new collaborations that will accelerate ecosystem growth. The tangible value that Endless brings to creators, developers, and the global community as the best infrastructure for these converging technologies was fully demonstrated at this event."

Endless stands at the forefront of the Web3 revolution, providing a fully decentralized infrastructure layer designed to enable the next wave of digital innovation. By seamlessly integrating AI-native tools with blockchain technology, Endless enables an intelligent, modular digital ownership, governance, and co-creation platform. Its commitment to privacy, security, and user empowerment makes it an ideal foundation for AI, Web3, and gaming applications, positioning it as a key enabler of the decentralized digital economy.

The success of Singularity 3.0 highlights Endless' ability to convene global stakeholders and drive substantive progress in these rapidly evolving fields. The event paved the way for new partnerships, use cases, and innovations, further expanding the Endless ecosystem and solidifying its leadership at the convergence of AI, Web3, and gaming.

About Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud

Endless Web3 Genesis Cloud is a decentralized smart protocol dedicated to connecting the Web2 and Web3 ecosystems, providing developers with a one-stop Web3 application development platform, and providing users with a Web2-level experience. Based on the public chain of the Move language, Endless integrates a variety of AI capabilities and plug-ins, and is committed to becoming the best connector between AI and Web3. It allows developers to build encrypted AI applications more simply and quickly in a modular way, promoting the arrival of AI agent super-intelligent systems.
